antiRepeatCompliance: Black background (#0d0d0d) with magenta (#ff0066) + electric yellow (#e6ff00) — not light paper+red from Pass 1
Protest poster collage with torn edges and wheat-paste texture — not newspaper manifesto from Pass 2
DIY punk poster aesthetic with stamp/marker/spray-paint interactions — not terminal CLI from Pass 3
Chaotic collage with torn paper textures — not blueprint grid from Pass 4
Impact heading font — not Anton (pass 1), Playfair (pass 2), monospace (pass 3), or Barlow Condensed (pass 4)
Post-it note chat format — not memo-format (pass 2), REPL (pass 3), or radio dispatch (pass 4)
Corkboard/flyer project listing — not card grid, table, or file listing from prior passes
